feedback.text: I personally consider that protecting consumers from such exploiting and exciting stategies should be one of the most important tasks of the policy. This applies not only to activities aimed at extracting money from the pocket of the simple person, but also to recover the property that was supposed to be illegal because of general terms and conditions. This also concerns the purchase of digital content aka video games that the buyer can no longer use because the developer no longer has an interest in it even though it has been purchased.
